FRIDAY OR MONDAY, PET SHALL HAVE CHILD FOR THOSE DAYS AS WELL. ON OFF WEEKS, PET TO HAVE CHILD ONE DAY FROM 3PM TO 7PM. PET TO GIVE 24 HOUR NOTICE TO
TO RESP C/S=$756.00/MN COMMENCING 7/1/00. COURT GIVES RESP DEPENDENT EXEMPTIONS FOR TAX PURPOSES. IF PET'S INCOME IS MORE THAN WHAT IS USED IN
S NEED TO AGREE TO CHANGES IN SCHOOL AND EXTRACURRICULAR ACTIVITIES. COURT FINDS PET HAS GREATER ABILITY TO PAY AND THEREFORE ORDERS PET TO PAY
